criteria.notes: Plain static HTML/CSS/JS site; no React or @amsterdam/design-system-react used.
Custom CSS styling with no --ams-* design tokens or Tailwind bridge.
No ADS Grid/Column 4/8/12 layout system used; layout is custom CSS.
Header and footer are present visually but built with plain HTML, not ADS components.
Form uses plain HTML inputs and labels, not ADS form components.
No banned libraries (MUI, shadcn, Chakra, etc.) are used; pure HTML/CSS/JS.
All visible text in the screenshot is in Dutch including headings, paragraphs, form labels, and footer.
Dutch is clear but some sentences are long and complex, not consistently at B1/Heldere Taal level.
Grep confirms 5 paragraph tags per page; screenshot shows substantial paragraph content on index.
Content references real Zuidas features: station Amsterdam Zuid, A10 Zuid, woningbouw, kantorengebied.
Consistent professional, informative tone throughout the visible content.
Three separate HTML pages created: index.html, projecten.html, leefomgeving.html.
Newsletter form clearly visible with Naam, E-mailadres, consent checkbox, and Aanmelden button.
Top navigation bar with Overzicht, Projecten, Leefomgeving links visible in screenshot.
